## North Star

Build the **truth-graded legal-ops AI** that lets Landtek become "the most forward-thinking, truth-seeking, dependable player in PH property management." Two surfaces today:

- **Active client work** — represent Patricia Zschoche (MWK estate) + Allan Inocalla (Paracale) + future clients through case lifecycles with deadline-guarantee and proactive expedition
- **System** — Leo (evidence-grade RAG + comms + autonomous sentinels) doing the legal-ops work that scales beyond Jonathan's hours
